_comment: MAC (uppercase hex, no separators) → slot, or {slot, name}. Copy to duck-map.local.json (gitignored) and fill in your hardware. Keys are case-insensitive. Keys starting with _ are ignored. Both value forms work and can be mixed. Find a duck's MAC: connect it once with no map and read Stage's reject log, or read the boot serial (duck_id=...). See boyband/docs/duck-id-mapping.md.
